message:
feat(fsqlite-harness): add parametric TLA+ spec skeleton export with comprehensive tests

- Add export_parametric_spec_skeleton() for generating customizable TLA+ module
  scaffolds with variable declarations and invariant placeholders
- Add 5 new tests: export_concrete_behavior, export_spec_skeleton, export_deterministic,
  mvcc_commit_scenario, and e2e_export_roundtrip validating TLA+ output correctness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
